review_text: Keenan was awesome, food was just as good.  Thank you!

2nd time at the Saganaw location, Keenan set it up for me on my 1st visit. Great follow through by Olivia and the chef(s). Perfect margueritas, tasty food, friendly, attentive service with cool patrons (regulars). Here for training, usually go to the same restaurant in Byron Center, great everything there too! Hats off to Corbin in BC, friendly, sharp bartender!
Worst Mexican food I've ever tasted  September  30ths 1230 pm.. Someone needs to call ice

I use to love this place. I went there today 11-28-25. And I got this dinner that was supposed to be pork tips with a chili type of sauce.  When it came to the table I'm picking around on the meat to see how tender the meat was. Well I come across a big pork bone. It look like a damn country rib. With no meat on it. So I told the waitress. She could take it back and I'm not paying for its nothing but bone and grizzle. It was the worst dinner I have ever had there. So a manger come's out and say's since you have eaten some of it. That the best he could do is give me half off my dinner. The only reason the I even had about two bites was because I was trying to deal with it. But there wasn't much meat there. Who is going to eat a big damn bone 🦴. And the waitress was bad to. Beware of the Big bone!
Keenan was very welcoming and Rio Luna brings me back a little bit of SoCal back to cold Michigan. Try their Agua frescas!!!!
Awesome food!
No better place to get street tacos in Saginaw!

BEST PLACE FOR DELICIOUS MEXICAN FOOD!!! Our server Angelica A was the best! Super friendly staff, cheerful atmosphere and good prices. You definitely get your money's worth here and the tastes remind me of all the delicious flavors you find in the southwest United States. Definitely our go to when in Saginaw!
The Food was awesome, The margaritas were amazing. The general manager was even better. 10/10 recommend ☺️

Clean and good service.  Salsa was too hot with no mild option.  Chicken Quesadilla could have used more chicken, but otherwise was good.  The biggest drawback was the loud music coming from somewhere we could not figure out.
Great food and service.

we will be back!!

Delicious enchiladas. We had a party of 10, great service and excellent food.
I really everything mostly my waitress Liv. She is so full of life and with the most beautiful smile her parents must be really proud of the way she is. See you again Little Sweet Miss Liv

Very reasonably priced, they accommodated a large group for lunch, the food was good, I had ground beef tacos, plenty of parking, easy to find, nice staff. It was so good I went again took a new friend for dinner. I had enough food I was able to take some home and it was dinner the next night.  Our server Bianca was very helpful and friendly!
Olivia was a great server great attitude
Olivia was my server and she was amazing, she made sure that i was taken care of.
Good food
Keenan was amazing waitperson and made our celebration wonderful. Food was excellent. Highly recommend

Saginaw, MI has some of the best tacos in the state, this place? NO NO NO. We came in around 7pm after Christmas shopping. We were starved. I got 3 different street tacos, and my husband got enchiladas. All had different meat from chicken to ground beef to pork and it was all burnt and had no flavor other than that of an over fired grill and that of a dirty pan. The margs were also not great 😕 they came out with warm goblets, that made the tequila thick and the ice melted so then we were left with watered down sour mix that was warm. My one star overall was for the food, I have never left a Mexican restaurant in Saginaw and been disappointed until tonight . The parking lot is pretty dark and it was ice due to recent weather. Our waitress was good, shy, but good. She didn't seem to know the menu prices but I digress
Might just be the best all around Mexican restaurant in town. Olivia H was the best server!

We frequent here often with no issues, staff are wonderful! However on our last visit on 12/18/25 I was violently Ill. Not saying that the food was bad, hubby had same dinner and was fine. But I have a severe allergy to shellfish (shrimp etc.) and though I can't prove it I'm sure there was so sort of cross contamination. It's the only thing that makes me that sick. Will have to wait until I feel trusting again to return 😕
Kristina was absolutely wonderful she was a wonderful waitress. Food is excellent!
Server was amazing as was the food

It was a busy Friday at Rio Luna, and our server Olivia was kind, helpful, and fast. She is an absolute STAR at her job - request her section when you come in!
The Chilequiles Rojos, Quesabirria Tacos, and Chicken Fajitas were delicious with generous portions. We ordered a slice of Tres Leches cake to go. Can't wait to try it!
We came in for dinner tonight and it was packed! Olivia was great, she kept checking in on us and was very attentive. Great service!
Kristina was very nice and made sure that we had everything we needed.
Cristina was fabulous! She was polite and quick. Really enjoyed her service tonight!
First time at this restaurant and I like it.   Got the carne asada tacos and they poor a lot of meet on them.

My favorite nachos I’ve had in Saginaw township and just Saginaw period, I sat down and ordered my nachos grandes plate and literally 4 minutes later the huge plate of nachos came to my table and they are so good, that white queso they use for the nachos is so flavorful and good. If you’re in the township, highly recommend

Everado was knowledgeable, friendly, and engaging! He made great recommendations, answered all our questions, and checked in to make sure we were enjoying our meal! Absolutely fantastic meal, service, and location!
Food is always great! Our server, Olivia was very attentive and pleasant. Great service!
Liv was so kind & took excellent care of us 10/10

I can’t remember her name but she’s young and with beautiful blonde hair. I loved her so much she definitely made my experience here amazing. This was my first time here and I will be back!!!!!!
My server was amazing she was very kind and sweet, I’m pretty sure her name was Olivia I could be wrong but she was a beautiful young women with blonde hair, she made our experience amazing today!

Our server Keenan was absolutely amazing. Extremely friendly and attentive!!!! The food and environment was top tier. We will be back!

Olivia is a very good host and we loved her service and personality 💜💜💜💜thanks from Cookie And Cece

The service was lacking the two times I've been there... I tried the carnitas the first time and they were dry and not the taste I was looking  for.  But that said, my sister had the birria tacos both times and I got them this time. They are PHENOMENAL!!!! Which is why I gave their food 4 stars. The birria tacos are their saving grace!!! My son had the shrimp tacos, he was not a fan. Their margaritas are on point as are their Piña coladas. The atmosphere is fun and festive.

Total 5 star sweep! The restaurant was great and our waitress took great care of us. We never went without anything!

I got 3 street tacos and guacamole. It was amazing. Looking forward to our next trip back!

Great service. Food came out fast after ordering. So delicious. Their chips are warm and fresh. Perfect salsa. We had seafood chimachinga and beef tacos with refried beans and Spanish rice. Everything was hot, so very tasty.  We recommend this restaurant,  and will be back again!
First time at the Rio Luna..AMAZING service by Liv.. she was wonderful, always had a smile and so , so helpful!! Best service we have had in a long time! Food was amazing! Will definitely be back!

Good salsa, good food, good service. Reasonable prices. Keenan was our server. Funny guy.

I went on a Tuesday for their taco Tuesday deal, and left with fried icecream, so delicious! Keenan, our server, was extremely respectful and polite. He even helped us with which toppings to have on our fried icecream! Would 100% come back, every Tuesday in fact!!

Had 3 different street tacos for lunch. (Beef,chicken,pork) they were all very good! Waitress was very accommodating and nice. Only problem was that it took about 5 min for the hostess to acknowledge we were there so we could get a table. Overall we will be going back.
Cadin was an amazing server! Super great place to get drinks!
Kadin was a great waiter for us!
Best server every thank you kadin!!!

Came here to have a nice dinner with my family, the queso was good, but the rest of the food was bland and COLD, I told my server and she said the best she could do was MICROWAVE it!? I’m not paying $18 for a meal that was cold in The first place then microwaved, that’s insane, I sent it back and just didn’t eat. Honestly Taco Bell on the way home was better than this place. The birria was super bland my husband was very disappointed. On top of all of that I was having to hold the table leg down with my foot to stop the table from wobbling the entire time.Annoying.
This was such a fun place to dine at. Complete with great segice and great food! Will be back.
Love the food and Olivia our server was so on top of it and treated us so well!

Wish I could leave no stars  Orders wrong every time! Tried to give them another chance but def not making that mistake again Ordered 20 dollar birria flour tacos got corn AGAIN received no consume(literally what makes it a birria taco htf  do you forget the most important part) . Can’t call to fix it they keep they phone off so of course no way to contact to even attempt to make it right
Kadin was awesome!

Olivia was a great server.
Olivia was wonderful

Worst service I’ve ever had! Highly disappointed! My husband and I waited for half an hour to get water and waited another half an hour and still didn’t get our appetizers. People got seated way after us and they got their food and left before we did! Even made reservations way ahead of time, my husband called to make sure we were in the books and, was told yes and then we got there and was told we’re not taking reservations! So ignorant!
Olivia was a great server, very friendly and always kept my girlfriend and I happy
The tacos were great the rice was flavorless and had peas in it?! We sat for a hour and got nothing until our stuff came out the food was good tho

Where do I even begin? This was not a meal. This was a cinematic masterpiece directed by our waiter. From the moment he approached the table, the atmosphere shifted. The lighting seemed warmer. The air felt fresher. I’m fairly certain the background music got louder out of respect.

When he described the specials, I saw my entire life flash before my eyes. I didn’t choose my entrée — the entrée chose me. His timing? Impeccable. His water refills? Telepathic. I blinked and my glass was full. I breathed and the bread basket appeared.

At one point I considered standing up and slow clapping.

If customer service had a Hall of Fame, he would already have a wing. If excellence were a person, it would nervously ask him for tips. I came in hungry and left spiritually fulfilled.

Five stars feels disrespectful. I would rate this experience “astronomical.” NASA should study him. Universities should teach courses about him. Someone write a documentary immediately.

I will be telling my future children about this waiter.

I wanted to take a moment to recognize the outstanding service we received from our waiter Kaiden. From the moment we were seated, they made us feel genuinely welcomed and taken care of. It wasn’t just about taking our order — it was about creating an experience that made our visit memorable.

They greeted us with a warm smile and great energy, immediately setting a positive tone for the meal. They were attentive without being overbearing, checking in at the perfect times and making sure our drinks were always refilled and that we had everything we needed. It was clear they were paying attention to the details.

What really stood out was their knowledge of the menu. They confidently answered our questions, made thoughtful recommendations, and even suggested a dish I probably wouldn’t have ordered on my own — which ended up being one of the best meals I’ve had in a long time. Their enthusiasm about the food made us even more excited to try it.

Even though the restaurant was busy, they never seemed rushed or stressed. They handled multiple tables smoothly and still made us feel like we were their priority. That kind of composure and professionalism is rare and truly appreciated.

Most importantly, they were personable and authentic. They engaged in friendly conversation, remembered small details we mentioned, and made us laugh. It felt less transactional and more like genuine hospitality. You can tell they care about doing a great job and making sure guests leave happy.

Because of their service, our entire experience was elevated. Great food is important, but exceptional service is what makes people want to come back — and this waiter is exactly the kind of employee that builds loyalty.

I hope management recognizes how valuable they are to the team. Employees like this make a lasting impression and represent the restaurant in the best possible way. We will absolutely be returning, and we’ll be hoping to sit in their section again.
Kadin was an absolute delight for our table, he was very efficient and took so much care of us
Kaydin was the COOLEST server ever!Y made the entire experience so amazing and awesome!
Great food and service! Will definitely come back for more 🙂
Kadin was an amazing server he is so nice and funny and attentive made sure our experience was amazing and fully recommend coming here and having him!
Olivia was an incredible waitress!
Olivia was a wonderful waitress.
First time here. Amazing food and service. Great price for 2026 lol
It was very inviting once we came in. The food is absolutely good. The service was absolutely exceptional. The drinks were absolutely fantastic. Thank you for having us. We will come again
Really like this place very welcoming and service was great plus food was delicious...

Enjoyed a wonderful Street Tacos dinner with friends, and everyone thought the food was great! Almost no wait, server memorized our order, and the meal was delicious. Process were on par with other similar restaurants. Would eat here again 😀

Our server Liv was top notch.  We were attended to promptly.  She had great suggestions as this was our first visit here.  We never ran out of drinks or chips and salsa.  She always had a smile which made so feel like family.  We will be definitely be back and will request Liv on every visit.  You are lucky to have her as a server.

Liv Hescott was the best waitress I’ve ever had. She was so bright and bubbly! Most positive person and the cutest ever. I’ve never had a waitress so on top of everything and such a girl boss. Love her 🤍🤍
Greta street tacos 😊
A wonderful place for authentic Mexican food. Christina was our waitress and she was incredibly helpful and polite. She helped make the night memorable, and I'm sure to come visit again.
Great service! Awesome service! super friendly we left out of with full stomachs and smiles.
Liv was a wonderful  and friendly waitress. She was attentive and fun. The food was delicious!! We'll definitely be back!

The food here is great, if you can get service. Had to call 4 times last week to get a worker to answer the phone. But I let it go, thinking they are probably busy. Get to the restaurant to pick up my food and there are 0 cars in the parking lot and every worker is walking around on their phones. This week it took 7 calls to get someone to answer the phone just to put put on hold for over 10 minutes. Guess we will see if they are busy tonight. Good food if you can get them to answer the phones
Liv was amazing! She is so sweet and made sure everything came on time even though she was the only waitress!

Liv is the BEST!!!  So friendly and personable.

Delicious food, fast and friendly service. Very welcoming dining room. Come to Rio Luna!

we had kaden as our server and he was amazing. the food was delicious and service was great!
Queso and food was amazing! Our server Kadin was so nice and attentive.

Kadin was amazing highly recommended!!!
Vianca was incredible. Guided us through the menu and even got us to try the ceviche and Cadillac margaritas. Thank you for a wonderful experience.

Keenan was amazing!  The food was incredible as always. My favorite dish is the seafood chimichanga. It was recommended by a server years ago and I’ve never strayed.  Keenan was amazing with my kids and gave my youngest an amazing experience for his 4th birthday.

Our server was amazing. I definitely recommend Taco Tuesday for everyone!

Our server was AMAZING! She right there to make sure everything was good. She was not only concerned for her customers she was so knowledgeable about the items they sold. Her name is Olivia. She's a keeper. This was our first time here and I can without a doubt because of her & the delicious food we will return. I really can't stop saying wonderful things about her. Thank you, Thank you, Thank you Olivia for making our meal wonderful by the attention you give your customers. Well done.🙂
Excellent food at very reasonable cost. Our service was outstanding.

Very authentic Mexican restaurant 😋

Olivia was wonderful, very accommodating and friendly!
Olivia did a great job, she was very pleasant even though we changed tables 5 times. 😀 She was very attentive and helpful!

The tacos are the best and the service is amazing! Keenan is amazing at what he does and gets our order right every time! The prices are great and the atmosphere is what you would what at a great Mexican Restaurant! Keep it up Rio Luna!!!! ❤️

Love the Margaritas and the Molcajete!! Went during happy hour and the apps were SPOT ON!! Queso Grande is what we ordered and it was delicious!! Will be back!!
Food was not good, waiter kept ignoring us, went to check out and I believe he is either the manager or owner he was being dismissive definitely will not be back,
It was so good I ate here two nights in a row.
Olivia was fantastic!!  Food was delicious!
Our waitress was absolutely AMAZING!!! SO friendly and went above and beyond! Thank you
Our server, Nola, provided exemplary service and made sure we felt cared for like some of her best friends. She made my friends’ night! Also the chips and salsa slapped!
Food was great! Our server Nola had us a 11 top and another one across the restaurant and took care of both of us very well!

This restaurant has such an amazing environment. The staff are all very welcoming, kind, and helpful! I always have a good time when I come here to eat! Food is delicious, haven’t tried anything I haven’t enjoyed! Recommend this to everyone!
A little slow to be seated (busy), but food was great as was the service.

I was very much looking forward to stopping in based on the reviews. Left feeling disappointed in every way. We went in, and waited several minutes at an unbusy time for someone to even notice us standing at the host stand, to the point where we were wondering if we were supposed to sit ourselves. We finally got seated, and while our food got out at a reasonable time, our server did not bring refills of anything or ask the entire time we were sitting. Our food was lukewarm at best, and save for the specialty marinated pork taco and the refried beans, was bland. My Al Pastor taco was dry, burnt (not the good kind of char), and flavorless. There were plenty of staff but save for a couple of them, most were standing around in the staff area doing nothing. Idk if we caught them on an off-day or not, but it was a subpar experience all around.
Loved the elote and birria tacos, and the music playing was a whole vibe! I enjoyed the whole experience. Thank you to Osiel for taking care of my mom and I, great service!!!

Sara was my bartender, drinks amazing. Greeted as I sat down.

I had the mole chicken enchiladas. 4 out of 5. I’m of Mexican descent and use to a thicker and more flavorful mole but it didn’t disappoint.
I will definitely come back. Before I leave Saginaw.
Definitely do recommend.
Their margaritas and Daquiris look amazing.
Great food and service!

Online ordering is awful. They make you order through a 3rd party site which charges you like 25% more. And prices are already high, considering the small amount of food you get. With that being said, the food is very tasty. I really like thier refried beans. I just wish online ordering was through them, so you're not getting ripped off.
Olivia was a great server! Very impressed with her knowledge of the menu. Very helpful and on top of serving my friends and me a margarita!
Aniya was my server. Amazing service and food
Oliva was so friendly and attentive to our group! Thank you for a amazing dinner😁
Olivia was a wonderful server! Such a great experience!
The Seafood Chimichanga was delicious!
Nola M was a great waitress

Arrived was seated sat there for approximately 30 minutes while various waitresses served their tables a while trying to avoid making any contact with my table. Watched others come in after me and get waited on, their orders taken, and their food brought to them. Left after I saw that. Then on the way out, a waitress that was never seen before carrying a tray of food, runs after me on my way out the door saying she'll take care of me and to not leave. After 30 minutes of without any service, my decision was made.

I showed up today 15 minutes after my take out was supposed to be ready. The girl at the front looked for my order and then came back and hid behind another employee. I found that strange.
The other employee asked for my name, went to the back and also came back with no information about my order.

Thinking maybe I ordered from the wrong place I left, drove up the street to check at another restaurant. After the other restaurant came up with nothing I called Rio Luna back and tried to explain the situation. The girl on the phone was the same girl who checked for my order the first time, she cut me off and said "yes it's here".

Now, over 20 minutes after my order was supposed to be ready I walk back into the restaurant and was told it was just now getting bagged up. The same girl walks out with my order. I show her my text confirmation, with the time it was supposed to be ready and how it was under a different name (los tres amigos) and she just looks at me and shrugs. She did not care.

I finally get home with my order and my receipt was $8 less than what I paid?! I left a message for management right away, but haven't heard back as of yet.
Chriselda was amazing 👏
I love coming to Rio Luna’s especially for the Burrito Mojado! The service is alasts Excellent  and I want to thank Chriselda for taking great care of me. She’s very kind and attentive.

Awesome and waiter very helpful with suggestions.

If you haven’t been to Rio Luna Taco & Tequila yet, you’re missing out. I stopped in for lunch yesterday and had a great experience.

The food was excellent, the fajitas were some of the best I’ve had in Saginaw. The prices were also very reasonable, especially for the portion sizes and quality.

What really stood out was the service. I believe my waitress’s name was Nola, and she was very friendly, attentive, and welcoming throughout the meal. Great food, good value, and excellent service. I’ll definitely be back again soon.
Keenan is amazing! A wonderful people person! Very friendly!
We had Keenan as our server, absolutely amazing, fast and great service. I suck at reviews, but this young man made the experience here even better.
Great service, fast and friendly

Olivia was AMAZING!! Loved having her as our waitress! Food was awesome as well :)
Olivia was AMAZING. I’ve been here several times and she’s the best waitress I’ve had since they’ve opened. 10/10 I’ll be requesting her in the future.

I was in this pathetic place tonight spent 62.00 on some d og food. Tacos was cold, not warm the meat was cold , skimpy and bland. Absolutely FANTASTIC service from Olivia H.!!! She was super nice and prompt! The other servers were all super nice too and we will be back for sure! Always the best spot for tacos!!!
Delicious food every time I come here. It is always super clean and a great staff! Our server Olivia was fantastic, super attentive and friendly!

Autumn is a very friendly and very accommodating waitress. She has such an awesome natural way about her and makes you feel very welcomed and important! You don’t meet many like her! You’re very, very blessed to have her represent your business!

Kadin was an amazing server!!!! Definitely come back

Recent takeout order we had ordered two tacos (on top of a few other meals for the family)and they tried to charge us for the taco dinner (and yes the dinner was there in the bag) but I explicitly ordered just two tacos, we didn't need the entire meal that's $10 more. So I brought it up to them before I left; the hostess went to get the manager and instead of just giving us the two tacos and having me pay for them, they removed the entire dinner from the bag and stated they could not just sell me the two tacos that I had ordered over the phone for some reason. They didn't even try to fix the issue (considering their person wrote down the order incorrectly) and I didn't get to eat anything because they removed my order. I would've been fine just taking the two tacos or literally anything else rather than leaving without a meal for part of my family and paying for it...

Maybe I'm overreacting, maybe not, but it really rubbed me the wrong way considering we (not kidding when I say this) spend over $2000 a year at this particular location (my wife is a queso fiend). Suffice to say it will be some time before we return...

Very nice restaurant and I was seated quickly. The staff were very friendly and accommodating. The margaritas were great. The food was good. Nothing amazing to rave about but nothing to complain about either. Just solid. I'd recommend this place for your go to Mexican food needs in the area.
Took 2 hrs to be served are food. Food was delicious and they where out of beans
Waitress Olivia was awesome! Very attentive very good food fast service..
We have been coming here for years. Alani B. Was by far the best server we have ever had. And it was a madhouse in here (5/5/2026 you gotta know what day that is)
Typical Michigan Mexican food. It wasn't great but it wasn't bad. Food was very greasy, the bottom of my taco salad bowl was mush before I was half way done. Sever was great! Very attentive and nice.
Food was really good I got taco salad with chicken the chicken was really good.  But not much salad.  Lots of chicken but not much lettuce and tomato.

I love love love their food but I called before hand in got put on hold the call dropped after 4 minutes of waiting so I recalled and someone answered again and I was put on hold again I shouldn’t have waited on the phone for about 22 minutes to place my order because the website wasn’t working for me I had to go in person to place my order because no one still came to the phone then I had to waste more time waiting to get the food I’m very disappointed because I love this place but this really disappointed me and there wasn’t a line I up front when I came in. I probably would’ve had to wait longer on the phone or no body probably wouldn’t have ever answered since I was still waiting on the phone line. The workers are good though. I didn’t receive any type of apology from the employee though which is sad because I paid $18 for food i like but have to enjoy irritated because the time spent on even getting it.
Great service
I absolutely love this restaurant! I order the birria tacos every single time and they never disappoint. Highly recommend!

We had ceviche verde, poppers, carne Asada street tacos and mole enchiladas. All very flavorful and plenty of meats. Drinks were sooooo good. VIANCA was very attentive and polite. Would definitely come back. And bring family.
Olivia was the best server! Made our night excellent with her fast and friendly service
Olivia was awesome! Food was great, as always. But Olivia was very attentive and enjoyable!
Ariana M was so amazing she was so sweet and accommodating. Thank you for making this a great experience!

Absolutely love the is place! The food is delicious, service is quick and friendly. This is a staple of our family! Keenan is a fantastic waiter. We just had Ariana on a repeat visit and she was wonderful!
Love our serve Olivia!! She was awesome and made our first experience great!! I highly recommend the supreme burrito!!
olivia took great care of us, very attentive and patient! created & held conversation amazing service !
Great food, authentic options, Olivia is one of the best servers in the Tri Cities!

Super delicious food, great service and reasonable prices! The steak fajita meat had a great sear and was super meaty flavored; the birria tacos tortillss were nice and crisp on the outside and the meat was super tender. Olivia took great care of us and was very attentive and friendly

In town for just the night, So picked this restaurant. A home-run selection! Great food, even better service (thank you Olivia!) and we left full and happy! I had the chile rellanos, the ladies had birria tacos, and the son had a fajita burrito.

First time here and great experience. Staff continuously checked on my friend and I. Autumn M had a great convo with us really an amazing person! Overall experience was 10/10. Thank you!! I will be back
Autum was the best waitress ever!!

One of our favorite places for tacos and Mexican food. The street tacos are exceptional, personal favorites are the Birria tacos, and tacos Al pastor. They come with beans and rice/cheese which are forward cooked well, and the complimentary chips and salsa are yummy as well. Fairly priced also, especially on Taco Tuesdays when they are discounted!
Happened upon this place traveling through town. It was excellent, the staff was very friendly service was prompt ant the food was excellent.
Burrito was mainly rice and beans, paid for chicken in my beef Burrito and got 4 tiny pieces.  Won't be back.

Fabricio is soooooo handsome and hospitable and the rest of my day will be the greatest because of his smile and hair and personality and name. And his spectacular ability to turn a frown upside down. Isn’t that the point ? Thank you Fabricio ! Give that man a raise. Please.
Fabricio was great and very polite. Exceptional job!
Food was amazing!!!!!! Serves was great. Keenan was efficient. Thank you

Came here for half off appetizers about an hour before closing. The hostess sat my mom but never informed the waitress that she had a table, so she sat there waiting and had to ask someone else who was going to wait on her.

After we ate and paid, we were tidying up the table to make it easier for our waitress to pick everything up (like we always do when we got out to eat), and for some reason another waitress (Olivia) that didn’t wait on us kept coming up to our table, rushing us. She started cleaning the table off while we were still there and told us that they’re closed at they need to sweep and mop. Unsure why she felt the need to tell paying customers that they needed to hurry up and leave.

When we decided to escalate the issue to another employee (possibly a manager, unsure), she followed us and stood behind us. I thought she was in a rush to clean? Why did she stop cleaning to come be nosy? Wasn’t she in a rush because the restaurant was now closed? Wouldn’t her standing there listening be holding her up?

Not only did she stop cleaning (which is why she was rushing us), but she then proceeded to argue with my mother and try to throw us out.

She had no right to come to our table rushing us. We were finished eating and already cleaning up. We had already paid. Olivia is unprofessional, rude, and lacks etiquette. Please retrain her.
Tried for the first time food was excellent. We had carnitas and boarder asada tacos. We would go back. Though the house margarita, not a fan.
Excellent food! The guacamole was chunky, the way I like it. The refried bean had really good flavor and the street tacos were very yummy. We will be going back!
My favorite taco place. Consistently produces the best tacos in town.
Service was good, the waitress Arianna was very professional.
Service, food & drinks were awesome.
Their street tacos are the closer thing to authentic Mexican food In Saginaw  I have found to date so far. I live in Mexico most of the year and am constantly searching for the foods I eat there.
Excellent! Guacamole, torta, everything was excellent. Kids and wife liked the food, as well. Definitely worth a visit.
Really impressed! Great food, amazing updates, fast, delicious, and the best server we have encountered in a long time. Olivia was the best!
